description: Change request rejected — different name confirms greeting interpolation

values.originalMessage: Redesign the whole homepage from scratch
values.reply: A full redesign is outside the monthly allowance — I'd treat this as a new build. Let me know if you'd like a fresh quote.

expected.subject: About your change request
expected.body:
Hi Pat,

Your change request:

  Redesign the whole homepage from scratch

My reply:

A full redesign is outside the monthly allowance — I'd treat this as a new build. Let me know if you'd like a fresh quote.

This one's outside what's covered by your monthly allowance, so
it doesn't count against your 3 requests this month. If you'd
like to discuss the bigger piece, just hit reply — happy to
quote separately.

You can see the full history (and submit other requests) on your
account dashboard.

— Ben
